scope: autopilot-mode addon runtime, install surface, and documented shell/platform coverage
full_compatibility_claim_rule: Do not claim full compatibility while any required target has status not-run.
evidence_policy: Evidence entries describe the current support contract. Historical run timestamps belong in external test logs, CI artifacts, or release notes, not in this matrix.

targets.name: macOS
evidence: local unit suite covers compatibility, bridge, governance signal, live semantic harness, privileged adapter, and autopilot state surfaces
installed bridge-to-adapter smoke covers Codex and Claude installed skill layouts
fresh install E2E covers default install/status, Codex status, installed adapter smoke, Claude lifecycle uninstall, and overall uninstall cleanup

targets.name: Linux
evidence: target listed but no Linux runner evidence is attached in this checkout
next_evidence_required: run addon unit and adapter subprocess tests on a Linux runner
attach command, exit code, and test summary

targets.name: Claude Code
evidence: install status covers addon-registry ok, autopilot-mode skill/adapter content_hash-match, and overall ok for the Claude surface
installed-copy smoke covers the Claude skill bridge writing approved run state and the adapter emitting a continuation payload
fresh install E2E covers install/status and temporary HOME lifecycle for the Claude surface
live semantic E2E has no successful Claude semantic result attached; status remains simulated-local until a credentialed Claude runtime run passes
next_evidence_required: run Claude live semantic E2E with working Claude credentials and attach command, exit code, and semantic_status evidence

targets.name: Codex
evidence: bash install.sh --platform codex --status covers addon-registry ok, autopilot-mode skill/adapter content_hash-match, and overall ok

installed-copy smoke covers ~/.agents/skills/autopilot-mode/scripts/autopilot_session_bridge.py writing approved run state and ~/.agents/skills/autopilot-mode/adapters/autopilot_mode.py emitting a continuation payload
fresh install E2E covers default install/status, Codex status, installed adapter smoke, Claude lifecycle uninstall, and overall uninstall cleanup
scripts/live_semantic_e2e.py --runtime both --scenario-source intent --execute --jsonl --timeout-sec 180 produces Codex inference_status=ok, semantic_status=parsed, and hook_status=complete
candidate-boundary check keeps Codex live observation signals candidate-only with action_file_allowed false and direct promotion false
tests/test_autopilot_session_bridge.py verifies --platform codex bridges current-session.json, intent-state.json, and intent-events.jsonl into approval-gated .autopilot run state
